texto: One is called a saiyami [those with inner control] when no intent of transgression remains within him. Even during anger-pride-deceit-greed when there is no violent intent
autor: that is called saiyam. A saiyami will go to moksha.
explicacao: Citação de that is called saiyam. A saiyami will go to moksha. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “One is called a saiyami [those with inner control] when no intent of transgression remains within…” articula reflexao, dada-bhagwan, intent em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
